title: Apple (AAPL) closes above ___ on March 18? Trading Odds & Predictions
full_text: This article from Polymarket details a prediction market for Apple (AAPL) stock's closing price on March 18th. Traders are speculating on various price points, with the market currently showing a 100% probability for Apple closing above $245 based on real-time crowd-sourced probabilities. The article also outlines the specific resolution rules for this market, including conditions for shortened sessions, trading halts, stock splits, and the use of Yahoo Finance as the official resolution source.
